---
title: "Policy"
description: "Policy experience and public-facing writing by Michael F. Joseph on U.S.-China relations, national security, intelligence, and technology, plus courses delivered to U.S. government."
---

I am passionate about policy impact. The current U.S. threat environment is tense, and I am eager to help any way I can. Please reach out! 

I was awarded an (inactive) full scope TS/SCI clearance. My public facing engagement is summarized below.  But I am a skilled briefer with core insights on US-China relations, technology integration into intelligence, and evaluation of national security programs. 

## Public Facing Policy Writing

[**The Prospects for a Negotiated Peace in Ukraine Are Bleak**](https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2022/03/24/prospects-negotiated-peace-ukraine-are-bleak/) — *Monkey Cage, The Washington Post* 

[**National Security Whistleblower Reform Is a Sticky Wicket**](https://warontherocks.com/2019/09/national-security-whistleblower-reform-is-a-sticky-wicket/) — *War on the Rocks* (2019)


## Courses Delivered to Government

- *Military Applications of Data Science* — U.S. Department of War
- *Interstate Conflict* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.  
- *Asia–Pacific Security* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.  
- *Decision Making in Crisis* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.  


## Select Policy Experience

**Director of Research & Evaluation** — Performance Systems Inc., Washington, DC · *2015–2017*
Designed randomized trials, surveys, and evaluations of U.S. government overseas
programs; trained 350+ military and civilian personnel on decision-making and
threat analysis in conflict zones.

**Analyst for Policy & Programs** — Management Systems International, Baghdad & Washington, DC · *2010–2013*
Supported a USAID project to rebuild the Iraqi civil service; built the statistical
cost-measurement tools underpinning the first U.S.–Iraq Memorandum of Understanding
on civil-service reform.

**Public Policy Consultant** — Various departments · *2008–2010*
Built risk-assessment frameworks and large-scale workforce analytics across 60
public-sector departments.

**Junior Professional Officer** — United Nations, Amman, Jordan · *2006–2007*
Developed indicators and surveys that informed an overhaul of education programs
for 400 schools and 40,000+ refugee students across four countries.
